meaning: n.凯西(Katherine 的昵称 亦作 Kathie)(f.)
examples: Off-screen, Kathy is under the watchful eye of her father Terry.
I wish to express my gratitude to Kathy Davis for her immense practical help.
Kathy expressed her gratitude to me.
Kathy-Jane Colgan, 17, and 18-year-old Emma Lennon had written an original score for the event.
Albright, says her sister Kathy Silva, is the reincarnation of their father Josef Korbel.
